name: NDA Non-Compete
text: The Recipient shall not, during the term of this Agreement and for a period of twelve (12) months thereafter, directly or indirectly engage in any business competitive with the Discloser where such engagement involves the use or disclosure of the Confidential Information.

legal_basis.note: Narrowly tailored CI-linked non-compete is valid

invalid_if: The restriction is not directly linked to the use or disclosure of Confidential Information.
The duration or geographical scope of the restriction is unreasonable.
It operates as a blanket prohibition on engaging in competitive business post-termination without a specific nexus to Confidential Information.
title: Non Compete
dispute_hotspots: Employee starts competing business using CI — injunction + damages available
Proving CI was actually used — evidentiary burden on Disclosing Party
